payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Close-up of a red-painted wooden chair back with ornate pierced/carved circular motifs and visible turned legs; glossy finish shows paint chips and wear at the top edge, and the object is edge-cropped and partial, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.
